fact_nuggets.text: Stakeout (Japanese: Stakeout) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. Prior to Generation VIII, it was the signature Ability of Yungoos and Gumshoos.
Signature Ability of Yungoos And Gumshoos

Effect [ edit | edit source ] This move effect may be in need of research. Reason: Does Stakeout deal extra damage to targets that enter the battlefield as a result of U-turn , Flip Turn , or Volt Switch ? You can discuss this on the talk page. In battle [ edit | edit source ] Stakeout doubles the power of moves used against targets that have switched in this turn. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Stakeout has no effect outside of battle.
In battle [ edit | edit source ] Stakeout doubles the power of moves used against targets that have switched in this turn.
This Pokemon's moves have double power against Pokemon that switched in this turn.
